description: Django CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS only has localhost:3000, but next.config.ts allowedDevOrigins has 127.0.0.1. If dev server is accessed at 127.0.0.1:3000, API calls fail CORS. Align both to the same host, and ensure the API base URL in services/api.js matches. Also confirm the 3 JSON endpoints (/reports/api/production/daily/, /monthly/, /top-parties/) return data when Django is running.
title: Fix dashboard CORS and API connectivity
